mapper.select: select * from main_banner_img WHERE is_valid is TRUE ORDER BY ord
select * from wj_histories ORDER BY hist_year desc, hist_month desc, hist_day_from
SELECT * FROM main_banner_img ORDER BY ord
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO main_banner_img (url, is_valid, ord) VALUES (#{url}, true, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(b.ord), 0) + 1 FROM main_banner_img b))
mapper.update: UPDATE main_banner_img SET ord = #{ord} WHERE idx = #{idx}
UPDATE main_banner_img SET is_valid = NOT is_valid WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.select: SELECT idx, category, category_ord, name, photo_url, job, phone, email, sort_order FROM wj_staff WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY category_ord, sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wj_staff (category, category_ord, name, photo_url, job, phone, email, sort_order, is_active, cdate) VALUES (#{category}, #{category_ord,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name}, #{photo_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{job,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort_order,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE wj_staff SET is_active = 0 WHERE idx = #{idx}
UPDATE wj_staff SET sort_order = #{sort_order} WHERE idx = #{idx}
UPDATE wj_staff SET category_ord = #{category_ord} WHERE category = #{category} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE wj_staff SET category = #{new_category} WHERE category = #{old_category} AND is_active = 1
mapper.select: SELECT dept_key, name, sort_order FROM wj_department WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT dept_key, name, verse_title, verse, verse_ref, description, goals, worship_time, worship_place, image_url FROM wj_department WHERE dept_key = #{deptKey} AND is_active = 1
SELECT idx, role, name, sort_order FROM wj_department_staff WHERE dept_key = #{deptKey} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wj_department_staff (dept_key, role, name, sort_order) VALUES (#{dept_key}, #{role,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name}, COALESCE(#{sort_order,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0))
mapper.select: SELECT idx, label, name, sort_order FROM wj_department_teacher WHERE dept_key = #{deptKey} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wj_department_teacher (dept_key, label, name, sort_order) VALUES (#{dept_key}, COALESCE(#{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '교사'), #{name}, COALESCE(#{sort_order,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0))
mapper.update: UPDATE wj_department_staff SET sort_order = #{sort_order} WHERE idx = #{idx}
UPDATE wj_department_teacher SET sort_order = #{sort_order} WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.select: SELECT idx, title, content, sort_order FROM wj_department_section WHERE dept_key = #{deptKey} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wj_department_section (dept_key, title, content, sort_order, cdate) VALUES (#{dept_key}, #{title}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, COALESCE(#{sort_order,jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE wj_department_section SET sort_order = #{sort_order} WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wj_department (dept_key, name, sort_order, is_active) VALUES (#{dept_key}, #{name}, COALESCE((SELECT MAX(d.sort_order) FROM wj_department d), -1) + 1, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE wj_department SET name = #{name}, sort_order = #{sort_order} WHERE dept_key = #{dept_key}
UPDATE wj_department SET is_active = 0 WHERE dept_key = #{dept_key}
mapper.select: SELECT idx, url, sort_order FROM wj_department_image WHERE dept_key = #{deptKey} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wj_department_image (dept_key, url, sort_order, cdate) VALUES (#{dept_key}, #{url}, #{sort_order,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE wj_department_image SET sort_order = #{sort_order} WHERE idx = #{idx}
